title: Scrum/Standup/Daily Update
summary: Dealer email issues persist. Copilot updates tested for stability. Personalized voicemail beta developed. Conditional tags feature completed and ready for deployment.

decisions.description: Spike out real-time text-to-speech generation for personalized voicemails.
Evaluate real-time generation options for voicemails as a subtask in current card.
Discuss canceling Thursday standup during tomorrow's or Wednesday's meeting.

actionItems.task: Compile and send secret shop requirements to Sergey Lyapustin.
Schedule a conversation with the Momentum API team.
Schedule a call with John to review serverless infrastructure and test integration.
Deploy conserver side for conditional tags to production and test.
Rewrite the tag for detecting voicemail interruption by customer.
Bring up 'unknown last name' voicemail issue to Kan Sing.
Listen to voicemails from last week for return telephone number speed improvement.
Spike out real-time generation approach for personalized voicemails.

tensions: Concern about losing dealers due to unresolved email address issue.
Concerns about pre-generating voicemails due to potential customer name updates.
Matt Watson's caution about AI increasing error variables in customized voicemails.
Confusion caused by 'Sophia Flores' placeholder name in voicemails.
Difficulty maintaining context when running separate LLM sessions for different tasks.
referencesToPast: Ongoing issue with adding a dealer's email address back to Mill's account.
Previously inaccurate tag for detecting when a customer answers during voicemail drop.
Momentum API topic mentioned in an earlier email thread.
Discussion before standup about personalized voicemail options.
Two older issues: automated voicemail leaving only first name and fast return telephone number.

contributions.description: Fixed technical issues in Copilot, making it more stable and faster.
Developed a beta version of personalized voicemail for Premier Collective.
Finished conditional tags feature in portal, ready for production deployment.
Raised concerns about customer name updates breaking pre-generated voicemails.
Proposed using real-time text-to-speech for dynamic voicemail generation.
Cautioned that AI increases variables for mistakes in customer interactions.
Suggested moving voicemail logic to dialer to avoid long-term storage.
Committed to compiling and sending secret shop requirements to Sergey.
Brought up the 'hello Kevin no last name' issue in automated voicemails.
Noted the return telephone number speed in voicemails was too fast.
Discussed breaking out Claude setup into orchestrator with specific agents.
Offered to share John's DevOps setup using agents from Codex and anti-gravity.
